SEARCH
Package org.key_project.slicing.graph

Class EquivalenceDirectedGraph

java.lang.Object
org.key_project.util.collection.DirectedGraph<GraphNode,AnnotatedEdge>
org.key_project.slicing.graph.EquivalenceDirectedGraph
All Implemented Interfaces:
Graph<GraphNode,AnnotatedEdge>
public class EquivalenceDirectedGraph extends DirectedGraph<GraphNode,AnnotatedEdge>
A directed graph, extended to store equivalence groups of vertices. Equivalence groups are identified using equality modulo proof irrelevancy. These groups are used to find multiple instances of the same formula in the graph.

      public Collection<GraphNode> getVerticesModProofIrrelevancy(GraphNode v)
